{{Relic Infobox|Big Mushroom|2}}
{{R|Big Mushroom||2}} is an {{QueryLink|Relics|rarity:Event|Event|2}} {{2|Relics|Relic}} from the {{E|Hungry for Mushrooms|2}} event. Upon pickup, it gives 20 Max HP. At the start of each combat, you will draw 2 fewer cards than usual.

== Sources ==
Can only be obtained from the {{E|Hungry for Mushrooms|2}} event by selecting {{Frame|Big Mushroom}}.
